description: Visualize k6 OSS results stored in Prometheus with Native Histograms.

links.title: Grafana k6 OSS Docs: Prometheus Remote Write
links.tooltip: Open docs in a new tab

panels.description: Select a different quantile to change the query
panels.title: HTTP Latency Stats

panels.description: Select a different quantile to change the query HTTP-specific built-in metrics
panels.title: HTTP Latency Timings

panels.description: min/max/p95/p99 depends on the available Quantile Stats

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0, sum by(le, name, method, status) (rate(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{testid=~"$testid"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(1, sum by(le, name, method, status) (rate(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{testid=~"$testid"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, name, method, status) (rate(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{testid=~"$testid"}[$__rate_interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, name, method, status) (rate(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{testid=~"$testid"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Requests by URL

panels.description: Filter by check name to query a particular check
panels.title: Checks Success Rate (aggregate individual checks)

list.description: Filter by "testid" tag. Define it by tagging: k6 run --tag testid=xyz
list.label: Test ID
list.name: testid

list.description: Statistic for Trend Metrics Queries. Calculate the φ-quantile (0 ≤ φ ≤ 1) in native histogram metrics.  0=min, 0.5=mean, 0.9=p90, 0.95=p95, 0.99=p99, 1=max
list.label: Trend Metrics Query
list.name: quantile

list.description: Adhoc filters are applied to all panels. To enable it, go to Dashboard Settings / Variables / adhoc_filter and select the target Prometheus data source.
list.label: AdhocFilter
list.name: adhoc_filter

title: k6 + RGW perf
